gist.headline: Genie in the chat
gist.blurb: Genie AI just dropped into the ecosystem. Whether you need live internet answers, document analysis, or just want to generate some wild videos, your wish is its command.
gist.summary: Genie AI has been added to the community apps showcase, bringing a massive suite of tools including live web search, document analysis, and multimodal generation.
gist.impact: Users can now explore Genie AI's all-in-one capabilities directly from the apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: A magical genie lamp theme. The Pollinations bee interacting with a glowing magic lamp that is emitting data or a friendly pixel genie, representing the new Genie AI app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, rubbing a glowing retro magic lamp. A friendly, chunky pixel magical genie made of glowing data emerges from the spout. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, rubbing a glowing retro magic lamp. A friendly, chunky pixel magical genie made of glowing data emerges from the spout. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
